source_rationale: A suggestive evidence of such hypothesis, as regards the CancerSEA functional state "Invasion", is the location of the two Invasion markers YBX1 (Y-Box Binding Protein 1) and HNRNPM (Heterogeneous Nuclear Ribonucleoprotein M) within the amplified regions of chromosomes 1p and 19p (Figure 4c).

A suggestive evidence of such hypothesis, as regards the CancerSEA functional state "Invasion", is the location of the two Invasion markers YBX1 (Y-Box Binding Protein 1) and HNRNPM (Heterogeneous Nuclear Ribonucleoprotein M) within the amplified regions of chromosomes 1p and 19p (Figure 4c).
